methods.method_name: Batch run up to 5 pivot reports for a property in a single call.
Batch run up to 5 reports for a property and receive multiple reports in a single call.
Check dimension and metric compatibility for a report request.
Create an audience export for later querying, capturing a snapshot of users in an audience at the time of creation.
List all audience exports for a property.
Query an audience export by name and ID to retrieve previously created data.
Retrieve configuration metadata for a specific audience export.
Retrieve metadata for dimensions and metrics available in reporting methods for a specified name.
Retrieve the current state of all quotas for a property in an early-access environment.
Run a funnel report for a property to analyze step-by-step conversion with up to 4 segments. Early-access endpoint.
Run a pivot report to get a customized pivot table of your Google Analytics event data.
Run a real-time report to fetch event data for a property with a 30-60 minute lookback window using `minuteRanges`.
Run a report to get customized Google Analytics event data statistics with a maximum of 9 dimensions per request.
